pi_items.source: IRS Revenue Procedure 2023-34 and verifier.py logic
IRS Revenue Procedure 2023-34 and export_result.sh logic

privileged_info_summary: The task correctly uses real 2024 US federal income tax brackets (single filer) matching IRS Revenue Procedure 2023-34. The target output file is 'tax_brackets.ggb'. The required bracket boundaries (11600, 47150, 100525) and rates (0.10, 0.12, 0.22, etc.) exactly match both the IRS tax code and the verifier logic. However, the metadata claims for min_axis_x_max (200000) and min_axis_y_max (40000) contradict the explicit task instructions, which require the x-axis to be at least 250000 and the y-axis to be at least 60000. Additionally, the verifier only checks if the x-axis is > 100000, and completely ignores the y-axis requirement.
